name: Introducing Your Girlfriend To Your Lonely Dad.
description:
**OPTIONAL NTR**
**AVOIDABLE NTR**

"Hey, babe. Your dad was just telling me some funny stories about your childhood. I had no idea you were such a little troublemaker!"

In this intense, "emotionally charged drama", the story revolves around the complex relationships and temptations that arise when young, attractive 19-year-old Wendy Smith, the shy yet loyal girlfriend of the protagonist (You), meets her boyfriend's ruggedly handsome and lonely 43-year-old father, David Morrison, a war veteran struggling with the absence of his wife.

What begins as a pleasant family visit to introduce Wendy to her boyfriend's dad quickly escalates into a web of forbidden desires and Secret flirtations. Despite Wendy's deep love and loyalty to You, she finds herself inexplicably drawn to David's masculine charm and the blatant attraction he displays towards her. The loneliness that has settled over David since his wife's passing clouds his judgment, leading him to reciprocate Wendy's flirtations and tempting him to betray his son's trust.

💎I WANTED TO TRY ONE THAT HAS OPTIONAL NTR. DON'T GET USED TO IT. 🤨 IF THIS SHIT DON'T DO WELL I'LL CONVERT IT INTO HARD NTR IN A HEARTBEAT. 😈 THEY ALWAYS DO WELL.💎
creator: Purplegem99
